elements.MAIN_EFFECT: At Noon — If you are first player, create an [Aerolith] token in your Landmarks.
{R} You may [Augment] target card in play or in Reserve. (If it has counters, it gains 1 more. This can't target Hero cards.)
{R} Choose up to one:  • Discard target Permanent with Hand Cost {5} or less.  • Sacrifice a Permanent. If you do, create a [Brassbug 2/2/2] Robot token in target Expedition.
{R} You may sacrifice a Permanent to create an [Aerolith] token in your Landmarks.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Create an [Aerolith] token in target player's Landmarks. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: (Tieni fino a tre carte nei tuoi fulcri durante la notte.)  At Noon — If you control a Feat, create a [Rust 0/0/0] token in your Companion Expedition. (It's a Companion with "{J} I gain 1 boost per [[Completed]] Feat in your Landmarks".)
[Scout] {1}. (You may play me from hand for {1} with "{h} Send me to Reserve".)  {J} Target Character gains 1 boost.
[Scout] {3}. (You may play me from hand for {3} with "{h} Send me to Reserve".)  {J} You may put a card from your Reserve in your Mana zone as a ready Mana Orb.
{R} You may reveal a Character with Hand Cost {4} or more from your hand. If you do, draw a card.

{T} : Target a Character you control, then roll a die. You may then spend any number of my Luck counters to increase the result. On a:  • 4+: attiva la sua abilità {D}.  • 1-3: ottengo 1 segnalino Fortuna.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {I} I don't count towards your Reserve limit.

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: [Scout] {1}. (You may play me from hand for {1} with "{h} Send me to Reserve".)  {J} Target another Character in play or in Reserve, then roll a die. On a:  • 4+, we both gain 1 boost.  • 1-3, it gains 1 boost.
If three or more single-terrain regions are visible, my {V}, {M}, and {O} are equal to my highest statistic.
At Noon — If you are first player, create a [Woollyback 1/1/1] Animal token in target opponent's Companion Expedition, then draw a card.
When an opponent draws one or more cards or [Resupplies] — I gain 1 boost.
When a Character you control gains [[Anchored]] — I gain 1 boost.
{J} If I'm facing a Character, I gain 1 boost.

{J} I gain [[Anchored]].  When a Character joins the Expedition facing me — I gain 1 boost.  When I go to your Reserve from the Expedition zone, if I had 2 or more boosts — You may put a card from your Reserve in your Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).

A mezzogiorno — Se sei il primo giocatore, la tua spedizione dell'eroe [Ascends]. (Fino al riposo, può avanzare anche se i terreni della sua regione eguagliano quelli della spedizione che affronta.)  When one or more of your [[Ascended]] Expeditions moves forward — If there's no Character facing it, draw a card.
[Scout] {1}. (You may play me from hand for {1} with "{h} Send me to Reserve".)  When I leave the Expedition zone — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in my Expedition.
At Noon — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in each of your Expeditions that's behind or tied.

{J} Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in each of your Expeditions that's behind or tied.  At Noon — Create a [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in each of your Expeditions that's behind or tied.
{J} If I'm in an Ascended Expedition, I gain 1 boost. Otherwise, my Expedition [Ascends].
{H} Target Expedition [Ascends]. (Until Rest, it can move forward even if matched in its region's terrains by the opponent's Expedition.)

{T}: pesca una carta, poi scarta una carta dalla tua mano. Puoi eseguire questa azione solo se sei il primo giocatore.  Se ci sono sei o più carte nella tua pila degli scarti, ottengo in modo permanente:  "Quando scarti una carta dalla tua mano — Falla tornare nella tua Riserva."
{J} I gain [[Fleeting]].  {J} I gain 1 boost per Character target opponent controls.
{H} Discard all other cards in play and in Reserve.  When a card joins the discard pile — I gain 1 boost.  If I'm [[Fleeting]], I am [Gigantic].
{H} I gain 2 boosts.  When I go to Reserve from the Expedition zone — [Sabotage].
{H} You may send to Reserve target Character with Hand Cost {2} or less.
